overall.description: A cinematic game engine clip depicting a cyberpunk city at night. The first half shows a rooftop scene with characters gathered around a fire barrel overlooking neon-lit skyscrapers, while the second half transitions to a first-person perspective walking down a narrow, muddy backstreet alley following a small illuminated robot.

segments.scene_description: The clip opens on a cyberpunk rooftop at night where two characters stand near a burning barrel. The camera slowly pans right across the concrete rooftop, revealing towering neon-lit skyscrapers in the distance and an elevated highway overpass. One character exits the frame early, leaving the other standing by the fire as the city skyline dominates the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow muddy backstreet alley with metal fencing

events.description: fade from black reveals first-person view in narrow alleyway
location text 'Backstreet' appears in lower left corner

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the muddy alley following a small illuminated robot ahead

notable_agents.action: small floating robot with bright yellow light moving ahead down the alley

entered.detail: corrugated metal fence lining the left side of the narrow path
corrugated metal fence and makeshift barriers on the right side
wet muddy path with puddles reflecting the ambient neon light
small makeshift structure with corrugated metal walls
distant glowing advertisements and building lights visible at alley end

segments.scene_description: Following a fade to black, the perspective shifts to a first-person view walking down a narrow, muddy backstreet alley. The path is flanked by corrugated metal fences and makeshift shacks, with sparse weeds growing along the edges. A small robot with a bright yellow light floats ahead, guiding the way toward the distant neon glow of the city center. The location text 'Backstreet' appears briefly as the camera continues moving forward through the enclosed space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot transitions from an expansive, neon-lit rooftop vista to an intimate, claustrophobic journey through a gritty urban alleyway. It begins with a slow pan across a concrete rooftop where characters gather around a burning barrel, revealing a skyline of towering skyscrapers and an elevated highway overpass. As the view fades to black, the perspective shifts into a first-person walk through a narrow backstreet flanked by corrugated metal fences and makeshift shacks. The camera then pushes forward through the mud and sparse weeds, following a small floating robot with a bright yellow light. This guided path leads deeper into the enclosed space, moving steadily toward the distant neon glow of the city center.
